Package es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.clave

Class that wraps Cl@ve authentication process (http://clave.gob.es) which is use as a SSO interface by many electronic sites of the public administration.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ClaveAuthentication
    Cl@ve authentication class wrapper.
    ClaveAuthentication.Builder
    Builder design pattern class.
    ClaveAuthentication.ClaveBean
    Class that holds Cl@ve response.
    ClaveAuthentication.Form
    Form class to manage attributes

Package es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.http.clave Description

Class that wraps Cl@ve authentication process (http://clave.gob.es) which is use as a SSO interface by many electronic sites of the public administration.
